summary: Round 4 batch clears the research-integrity bar — no concrete leakage (no forward_*/confirm_after_*/post_event_* fields), no secret access, no mass-symbol manipulation; primary risks are advisory: live-overlap on OI_Price/long entries vs the user's live BWE_OI_Price_monitor pump-long bot, percentile-flag staleness for top-decile / p25 / *_extreme regime tags if reference distributions are not strictly backward-rolling, and concentration on low-liq universe.

risk_assessments.leakage_notes: funding_rate sign and oi_change_pct are real-time observables at T0; no forward fields.
risk_assessments.live_conflict_notes: Exit kernel applied to research combos only; the user's live BWE_OI_Price_monitor strategy carries its own exit, so no shared-state conflict at backtest layer.

risk_assessments.leakage_notes: top_trader_position_ratio_dec is a regime tag; if '_dec' is a backward-rolling slope test it is fine. Verify SUPPORTED_FIELDS resolution does not use a centered or full-history reference window.
risk_assessments.remediation: Confirm in coverage_map_gen.py that top_trader_position_ratio_dec uses a backward-only slope window before scoring.

risk_assessments.leakage_notes: premium_bps is the real-time futures-spot spread; computable at T0.
basis_rate is observable at T0. Devil's scale-ambiguity concern is a parameterization/degeneracy issue, not a leakage issue.

volume_pct_below_p25 is a percentile-rank flag. Backtest integrity depends on p25 being computed from a backward-rolling reference window (per-symbol or universe-level). If p25 is fit on the full sample including post-T0 bars, this is a hidden forward function.
risk_assessments.remediation: Verify volume_pct_below_p25 in coverage_map_gen.py uses a strictly backward rolling-window p25; if it uses a full-sample quantile this becomes a block.

risk_assessments.leakage_notes: taker_buy_ratio_5m is a backward-rolling 5min aggregate; observable at T0.
session and hour_utc are clock-derived; fully observable.
global_long_ratio is a Binance-published real-time metric. Devil's static-vs-transition concern is a semantic issue, not leakage.
OI, funding, premium all real-time. Sample-size and scale-interpretation concerns are statistical, not integrity-related.
risk_assessments.live_conflict_notes: Same channel (OI_Price) and same side (long) as the user's live BWE_OI_Price_monitor pump-long strategy. With $1000 capital and 5–10% sizing, simultaneous fires on the same symbol could either double exposure or have one suppressed by the engine — both invalidate paper-vs-live equivalence.
risk_assessments.remediation: Tag as live-overlap with BWE_OI_Price_monitor long; paper-shadow must model combined-exposure cap (one position per symbol across research + live) rather than treating the strategies as independent.

risk_assessments.leakage_notes: volume_pct_top_decile and top_trader_position_ratio_high are percentile/regime flags. Same backward-window verification needed as x_volume_decay_trail_tighten.
risk_assessments.live_conflict_notes: Pricechange/short — different channel from live OI_Price/long; rare same-symbol overlap, manageable in paper-shadow.
risk_assessments.remediation: Confirm decile and high regime tags resolve via backward-rolling reference distributions only.

risk_assessments.leakage_notes: basis_rate, premium_extreme, oi_change_pct all observable at T0. premium_extreme regime tag should also be backward-rolling — verify alongside other *_extreme flags.
risk_assessments.live_conflict_notes: OI_Price/short opposes the live OI_Price/long bot on the same symbol; co-fires would offset rather than compound, but the offset itself is a real-portfolio behavior the backtest does not model.
risk_assessments.remediation: Log co-trigger events vs live BWE_OI_Price_monitor long positions in paper-shadow to quantify offset frequency before promotion.

risk_assessments.leakage_notes: listing_age_days, funding, liquidity_bucket all observable at T0.
risk_assessments.remediation: New-listing universe (≤30d) is typically 5–15 symbols at any moment; cap concurrent positions from this archetype to 1 per symbol and ≤2 archetype-wide to prevent capital concentration on a single fresh token.

risk_assessments.leakage_notes: global_short_ratio_extreme and volume_pct_top_decile are regime/percentile flags. No direct forward fields, but flag construction must be backward-rolling.
risk_assessments.live_conflict_notes: R6/long does not directly oppose live OI_Price/long but competes for the same $1000 capital pool when both fire near each other.
risk_assessments.remediation: Verify rolling-window construction of *_extreme / *_top_decile flags; enforce 1-position-per-symbol cap in synthesizer; paper-shadow must respect shared capital pool.

risk_assessments.leakage_notes: marketcap_bucket, session, hour_utc are static or clock-based. quote_volume_24h must be the trailing 24h (not a centered or full-day-after window) — confirm in data loader.
risk_assessments.remediation: Confirm quote_volume_24h is computed from the trailing 24h ending at T0, not centered or forward-looking.

risk_assessments.leakage_notes: liquidity_bucket and listing_age are static-ish; funding_abs_extreme is a regime tag (verify backward-rolling). No direct forward fields.
risk_assessments.live_conflict_notes: Filter biases the universe toward symbols where execution risk and adversarial front-running risk are highest; not a backtest-integrity issue but a real-fill-divergence concern.
risk_assessments.remediation: Mandate paper-shadow with realistic slippage modeling (≥25% edge haircut) for any combo gated by this filter; reject promotion if shadow P&L < 50% of backtest P&L.

risk_assessments.leakage_notes: move_pct and day_change_pct are observable at T0.
risk_assessments.live_conflict_notes: By construction this gate eliminates Reserved6 (defined as 8–15% in 180s) and most pricechange-channel pump events; if the synthesizer composes this risk archetype with R6 entries the result is a structurally null combo. Not a sandbox-boundary issue, but it would silence legitimate live-trade-eligible events if shared with the live system.
risk_assessments.remediation: Scope to OI_Price/pricechange channels only, OR relax thresholds (move_pct<=8, day_change<=20) before composing with R6 entries — otherwise expect 0-trigger combos and silent backtest failure.

risk_assessments.leakage_notes: oi_change_pct, event_type, taker_buy_ratio_5m all observable at T0. The descriptive 30s cross-channel sync is NOT parser-enforced — effective archetype is single-channel oi+pump+taker as flagged by Quant.
risk_assessments.live_conflict_notes: Direct same-channel same-side duplication of the user's live BWE_OI_Price_monitor pump-long strategy: same channel (OI_Price), same side (long), same trigger family (oi_change + pump). With $1000 capital and 5–10% sizing, simultaneous fires on the same symbol either double the intended exposure or cause one to be suppressed by the engine — both invalidate fill-equivalence between backtest and live, even though no backtest-integrity field is leaking.
risk_assessments.remediation: Synthesizer must combine with an explicit 'no live overlap' filter (skip when live_strategy_active==1 on the symbol) before any combo from this archetype reaches paper-shadow; alternatively model combined-exposure scenarios explicitly in the shadow run.

risk_assessments.leakage_notes: oi_change_pct, liquidity_bucket, global_long_ratio_high all observable at T0. The 'OI_Price → R6 within 60s' sequencing is descriptive, not parser-enforced — no leakage.
risk_assessments.live_conflict_notes: R6/short on a symbol where the live OI_Price/long bot may already be in position creates direct in-account hedging/offset within the same $1000 capital pool; not a backtest-integrity issue but a real-portfolio behavior the backtest does not model.
risk_assessments.remediation: Same as cc_oi_pc_synced_30s_long — gate with 'no live opposite-side position on this symbol' filter; enforce strict cascade-slippage model (≥30% edge haircut) for low-liq shorts in paper-shadow before promotion.
